tech_news.description: One key Siri AI upgrade is that it’s the same Siri everywhere, regardless of device—which Apple says was a very intentional goal.

tech_news.title: Take-Two's ex-AI boss says the generative AI hype is "poisoning the well" and could ward off all use of traditional AI in the future if it leaves a bad taste in everyone's mouth - Eurogamer
tech_news.description: According to the former head of AI at Take-Two, the hype around generative AI is not healthy, but he doesn't want you to write off AI entirely.

tech_news.description: Destiny 2 is not just ending, its support is being liquidated. What Sony is doing here is almost entirely unprecedented in the industry.
